---
title: Vosges
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779808247/20260117_113553_u5ocvg.jpg
description: Jura, vue sur une balade
categories: ["urbansketch"]
date: 2026-01-17
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779808247/20260117_113553_u5ocvg.jpg)
